body:
This PR adds an Exit / Leave button to the Rogue Mode gameplay interface so players can quickly return to the Lobby without refreshing the page.

Changes include:
- Add Exit button to the Rogue gameplay UI
- Navigate back to `/lobby` on click
- Keep existing Rogue gameplay, socket, save-point, and battle logic unchanged
- Preserve current dark fantasy visual style and responsive layout
- Support both desktop and small-screen viewports

No backend, database schema, API, or gameplay logic changes were made.

Verified locally with Rogue gameplay testing and `npm run build`.

这个 PR 为 Rogue Mode 游戏界面新增了一个 Exit / Leave 按钮，玩家可以快速返回 Lobby，无需刷新页面。

改动包括：
- 在 Rogue 游戏界面新增 Exit 按钮
- 点击后跳转回 `/lobby`
- 不修改 Rogue gameplay、socket、存档点或战斗逻辑
- 保持当前 dark fantasy 视觉风格与响应式布局
- 支持桌面端与小屏设备

本次改动未修改：
- backend
- database schema
- API
- gameplay logic

已通过本地 Rogue gameplay 测试与 `npm run build` 验证。
title: feat(rogue): add exit button to return to lobby
